## AXIS Project Reference
- **Project ID:** <!-- axis project uuid or N/A -->
- **Project Name:** <!-- short name -->

## Change Type
- [ ] Feature — new functionality
- [ ] Fix — bug or error correction
- [ ] System change — infrastructure, config, environment
- [ ] Database — schema or data change
- [ ] Refactor — code improvement, no behaviour change
- [ ] Documentation — docs or comments only

## Sector
- [ ] Code
- [ ] System
- [ ] Documentation

## Description
<!-- What was changed and why? Be specific. -->

## Risk Level
- [ ] Low — isolated change, easy to revert
- [ ] Medium — touches shared logic or multiple modules
- [ ] High — production-critical, data-affecting, or security-related

## Testing Done
<!-- What did you test? How? -->

## Reviewer Notes
<!-- Anything the reviewer should pay specific attention to? -->

## Checklist
- [ ] Tested locally
- [ ] No console errors introduced
- [ ] Environment variables documented if new ones added
- [ ] Database changes include migration file
